title: Skill Kit Manifest
description: Manifest file (kit.json) for a self-contained skill kit in the walterpinson/skills library.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference. Should point to the kit.schema.json in this repository.

name.description: Unique kit identifier, typically namespaced as '<namespace>-<kit-name>'.

namespace.description: Vendor or owner prefix. Do NOT include a trailing dash — tooling appends it when constructing the full name.

summary.description: Short one-line description of what the kit does.

description.description: Optional longer description in Markdown. The kit README.md remains the authoritative source of truth.

keywords.description: Tags used for discoverability and search.

targets.description: Target AI platforms this kit supports.

scopes.description: Supported installation destinations. When both are listed, the installer prompts the user.

entryPrompt.description: Relative path (from kit root) to the recommended starting prompt. This is a suggestion, not a gate — all prompts remain freely invokable.

files.description: Glob patterns (relative to kit root) that identify the kit's artifacts by type.

skills.description: Glob patterns matching skill files (SKILL.md and supporting assets).

requires.description: Kits or artifacts this kit depends on. Use npm-style semver strings: '<namespace>-<name>@^1.0.0'.

conflicts.description: Kits that cannot coexist with this kit. Use npm-style semver strings: '<namespace>-<name>@^1.0.0'.
